film.title: Princess Diaries 3
film.announcement: Anne Hathaway shares update that the project had a 'story breakthrough' after the team had to 'start over' with the script, indicating development progress on the third installment.

film.title: The Family Stone Sequel
film.announcement: Luke Wilson confirms that a sequel to 'The Family Stone' is in development, expressing excitement that the project is moving forward.
